task_completion.description: Verify the campaign name and type are set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a campaign creation form or saved record showing the Name as 'Industrial Sensor Launch 2026' and the Type as 'Web'.

task_completion.description: Verify the campaign status, budget, and expected revenue.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for fields in the campaign record showing Status as 'Active', Budget as '15000' (or 15,000), and Expected Revenue as '75000' (or 75,000).

task_completion.description: Verify the campaign end date is in December 2026.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an End Date field in the campaign record displaying a date that falls in December 2026.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'LinkedIn Promo' tracker URL is configured.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a tracker or URL configuration section showing the name 'LinkedIn Promo' associated with the URL 'https://pnwindustrial.com/sensors/linkedin'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Trade Show Kiosk' tracker URL is configured.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a tracker or URL configuration section showing the name 'Trade Show Kiosk' associated with the URL 'https://pnwindustrial.com/sensors/kiosk'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Partner Email' tracker URL is configured.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a tracker or URL configuration section showing the name 'Partner Email' associated with the URL 'https://pnwindustrial.com/sensors/partner'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the application's graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show interaction with a CRM, marketing platform, or similar web/desktop application GUI, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not just type the expected values into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs must be entered into proper form fields within the application, not written as plain text in Notepad, TextEdit, or similar applications.

integrity.description: Verify the trackers were created in the appropriate tracker/URL management section.
integrity.visual_evidence: The tracker names and URLs should be entered into dedicated fields or tables for tracking URLs, rather than just pasted into a general 'Description' or 'Notes' text box.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Campaign Name: 'Industrial Sensor Launch 2026'. Type: 'Web'. Status: 'Active'. Budget: 15000. Expected Revenue: 75000. End Date: December 2026. Trackers required: 1) Name: 'LinkedIn Promo', URL: 'https://pnwindustrial.com/sensors/linkedin'. 2) Name: 'Trade Show Kiosk', URL: 'https://pnwindustrial.com/sensors/kiosk'. 3) Name: 'Partner Email', URL: 'https://pnwindustrial.com/sensors/partner'.
